name: comlink
readme:
# comlink

An experimental IRC client written in zig. Join the discussion in #comlink on
libera.chat.

![screenshot of comlink](screenshot.png)

## Installation

### Arch Linux

[comlink](https://aur.archlinux.org/packages/comlink) is available as a package in the AUR. It can be installed using an AUR helper (e.g. paru).

```sh
paru -S comlink
```

### Zig Build System

`comlink` is written in zig and can be installed using the zig build system,
version 0.16.0.

```sh
git clone https://github.com/rockorager/comlink
cd comlink
zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe --prefix ~/.local
```

## Configuration

Configuration is loaded from `$HOME/.config/comlink/init.lua`

Works best with `soju`. [irctoday](https://irctoday.com) runs a paid instance of `soju`, and
another paid alternative is [pico.sh](https://pico.sh/irc)

```lua
local comlink = require("comlink")

local config = {
	server = "chat.sr.ht",
	user = "rockorager",
	nick = "rockorager",
	password = "password",
	real_name = "Tim Culverhouse",
	tls = true,
}

-- Pass the server config to connect. Connect to as many servers as you need
comlink.connect(config)

-- Bind a key to an action
comlink.bind("ctrl+c", "quit")
```

Storing passwords in configuration files is generally considered a poor
security practice. The following example reads the password from an external
password manager:

```lua
local comlink = require("comlink")

local proc =
  assert(io.popen("hiq -dFpassword proto=irc address=irc.example.com nickname=alex", "r"))
local password = proc:read("*l")
proc:close()

local config = {
	-- …other fields here…
	password = password,
}
```

## Contributing

Patches accepted on the [mailing list](https://lists.sr.ht/~rockorager/comlink)

Pull requests accepted on [Github](https://github.com/rockorager/comlink)

Pull requests accepted on
[tangled.sh](https://tangled.sh/@rockorager.dev/comlink)

releases.name: v0.2.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* docs(README): add Arch Linux installation instructions by @koibtw in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/11
* chore: add desktop file by @tranzystorekk in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/12
* Querycmd by @PalanixYT in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/15
* Add explicit join commands. Will open buffer when using join command by @PalanixYT in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/17
* Fix part command for last buffer by @PalanixYT in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/19
* vxfw by @rockorager in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/20
* Document example on using a password command by @WhyNotHugo in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/22
* README: add irctoday by @sewnie in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/23
* fix: deinit on app error by @sewnie in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/24

## New Contributors
* @koibtw made their first contribution in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/11
* @PalanixYT made their first contribution in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/15
* @rockorager made their first contribution in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/20
* @WhyNotHugo made their first contribution in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/22
* @sewnie made their first contribution in https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/pull/23

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rockorager/comlink/compare/v0.1.1...v0.2.0
